title: Umm Suqaym Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Umm Suqaym with a Z-Score of +3.20. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Umm Suqaym is causing significant concerns due to its extreme intensity. 
 The temperature levels are unusually high, with a CDD of 10.2 GG, and humidity at 50%. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 9.8 km/h, which may exacerbate the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact in Umm Suqaym.
